commits.message: docs(onboarding-threads): refresh tracker with full 2026-05-15/16 state
commits.author: shalombook

commits.message: feat(pixel): fire Purchase event on trial mandate capture
commits.author: shalombook

commits.message: fix(payment): use payment_method_id (not payment_id) to detect mandate capture
commits.author: shalombook

commits.message: fix(payment): grant trial credit only after Dodo mandate is captured
commits.author: shalombook

commits.message: fix(payment): make trial credit grant idempotent per user, not per subscription
commits.author: shalombook

commits.message: fix(payment): default billing_country from plan so Dodo shows local currency
commits.author: shalombook

commits.message: chore: redeploy to pick up cleaned Dodo live API key (no trailing \n)
commits.author: shalombook

commits.message: debug(payment): surface start-trial error detail in 500 response
commits.author: shalombook

panels.title: fix(payment): use payment_method_id (not payment_id)
panels.scene: A befuddled wizard (representing the payment system) is juggling two glowing orbs labeled 'payment_id' and 'payment_method_id'. The orb 'payment_id' slips and shatters on the ground. The knight points calmly at the remaining 'payment_method_id' orb.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: He chose the RIGHT ID! Our gold is safe!

panels.title: chore: redeploy to pick up cleaned Dodo live API key (no trailing \n)
panels.scene: A group of monks is painstakingly copying an API key onto a giant stone tablet. The knight wipes a single newline character off the tablet with a small cloth. The monks gasp.

bubbles.speaker: Monk
bubbles.text: The sacred key... it's PERFECT now!

panels.title: fix(payment): default billing_country from plan so Dodo shows local currency
panels.scene: The marketplace is in chaos, with vendors offering goods in strange, foreign currencies. The knight gently adjusts a sign above the marketplace, and now all prices are displayed in the local currency (gold coins). Villagers cheer.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: Now I can afford bread again!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It's about displaying the correct currency.

panels.title: 9 commits. 4 payment fixes. 1 trailing newline vanquished.
panels.scene: The knight is leaning against a wall, looking tired but impassive. In the background, villagers are erecting a small statue of a backslash followed by the letter 'n', both with wings.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: We shall always remember the Great Newline Removal!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: Just another day at the office.
